hooks.command: REPO=$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null); jq -r '.tool_input.file_path' | { read -r f; case "$f" in "$REPO"/*|"$REPO") ;; *) printf '{"decision":"block","reason":"Write blocked: file is outside repo"}'; exit 0;; esac; }

src_changed=$(git diff --cached --name-only -- 'src/' 2>/dev/null | grep -c '\.py$' || true); test_changed=$(git diff --cached --name-only -- 'tests/' 2>/dev/null | grep -c '\.py$' || true); tic_changed=$(git diff --cached --name-only -- 'docs/governance/tic-oracle.md' 2>/dev/null | grep -c '.' || true); if [ "$src_changed" -gt 0 ] && [ "$test_changed" -eq 0 ]; then printf '{"decision":"block","reason":"src/ changed but no tests/ changed. Add tests."}'; elif [ "$test_changed" -gt 0 ] && [ "$tic_changed" -eq 0 ]; then printf '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","additionalContext":"WARNING: tests changed but tic-oracle.md not updated."}}'; fi
jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_response.filePath' | { read -r f; case "$f" in *.py) ruff check "$f" 2>&1 || true;; esac; }
